narrative:
Strongsville-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,043 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
